---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for x8
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the use case and why the current behavior is insufficient.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you would like to see. Include API sketches, CLI flags, or example usage where relevant.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why did you reject them? Are there existing workarounds?

## Is this within scope?

Please check the project [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) to see whether this proposal aligns with the planned direction of x8. If it falls outside the documented scope, explain why you believe it still belongs in the project.
